title: New Fields Medalist and IMO Perfect Score Genius Tsimerman Announces Joining OpenAI
excerpt: The 2026 International Congress of Mathematicians opened on the morning of July 23 in Philadelphia. The four recipients of the Fields Medal for this year were a
content_html:
The 2026 International Congress of Mathematicians opened on the morning of July 23 in Philadelphia. The four recipients of the Fields Medal for this year were announced: Deng Yu, John Paden, Jacob Tsimerman, and Wang Hong. Among them, Deng Yu and Wang Hong became the first Chinese nationals to win the Fields Medal since its establishment, making history. Shortly after the announcement of the highest honor in mathematics, one of the newly awarded recipients revealed his next step in life: focusing on AI safety, and soon joined OpenAI.

This is Jacob Tsimerman. His core achievement that led him to win the Fields Medal was redefining the theory of o-minimality as a fundamental research tool in arithmetic geometry and complex algebraic geometry, and successfully proving several central conjectures in the academic community, including the algebraicity conjecture of Griffiths' period image and the André-Oort conjecture related to Siegel modular varieties, making significant contributions to number theory. After the press conference, he announced his intention to shift his research focus to AI safety and soon joined OpenAI. Upon the news, Mark Chen, Chief Research Officer at OpenAI, and Sebastien Bubeck, former Deputy President of Microsoft AI and current researcher at OpenAI, both confirmed and expressed their welcome. Mark Chen praised Tsimerman for his top-level mathematical talent, and also admired his rigorous and careful attitude and profound and unique thinking towards AI safety issues.

sentences.en: The 2026 International Congress of Mathematicians opened on the morning of July 23 in Philadelphia.
sentences.zh: 2026年国际数学家大会于7月23日上午在费城开幕。

sentences.en: The four recipients of the Fields Medal for this year were announced: Deng Yu, John Paden, Jacob Tsimerman, and Wang Hong.
sentences.zh: 今年菲尔兹奖的四位获得者揭晓：邓宇、约翰·帕登、雅各布·齐默曼和王宏。

sentences.en: Among them, Deng Yu and Wang Hong became the first Chinese nationals to win the Fields Medal since its establishment, making history.
sentences.zh: 其中，邓宇、王宏成为菲尔兹奖设立以来第一位获得菲尔兹奖的中国人，创造了历史。

blocks.html_en: This is Jacob Tsimerman. His core achievement that led him to win the Fields Medal was redefining the theory of o-minimality as a fundamental research tool in arithmetic geometry and complex algebraic geometry, and successfully proving several central conjectures in the academic community, including the algebraicity conjecture of Griffiths' period image and the André-Oort conjecture related to Siegel modular varieties, making significant contributions to number theory. After the press conference, he announced his intention to shift his research focus to AI safety and soon joined OpenAI. Upon the news, Mark Chen, Chief Research Officer at OpenAI, and Sebastien Bubeck, former Deputy President of Microsoft AI and current researcher at OpenAI, both confirmed and expressed their welcome. sentences.zh: 他获得菲尔兹奖的核心成就是将o-极小理论重新定义为算术几何和复代数几何的基础研究工具，并成功证明了学界的几个中心猜想，包括格里菲斯周期图像的代数性猜想和与西格尔模簇相关的安德烈-奥尔特猜想，为数论做出了重大贡献。

sentences.en: After the press conference, he announced his intention to shift his research focus to AI safety and soon joined OpenAI.

sentences.zh: 消息一出，OpenAI 首席研究官 Mark Chen 和微软 AI 前副总裁、现任 OpenAI 研究员 Sebastien Bubeck 均予以证实并表示欢迎。

sentences.en: Mark Chen praised Tsimerman for his top-level mathematical talent, and also admired his rigorous and careful attitude and profound and unique thinking towards AI safety issues.
sentences.zh: 陈马克称赞齐默曼拥有顶级的数学天赋，也钦佩他对人工智能安全问题严谨仔细的态度和深刻独特的思考。

content_html_zh:
2026年国际数学家大会于7月23日上午在费城开幕。 今年菲尔兹奖的四位获得者揭晓：邓宇、约翰·帕登、雅各布·齐默曼和王宏。 其中，邓宇、王宏成为菲尔兹奖设立以来第一位获得菲尔兹奖的中国人，创造了历史。 在数学最高荣誉宣布后不久，一位新获奖者透露了他人生的下一步：关注人工智能安全，并很快加入了 OpenAI。

这是雅各布·齐默曼。 他获得菲尔兹奖的核心成就是将o-极小理论重新定义为算术几何和复代数几何的基础研究工具，并成功证明了学界的几个中心猜想，包括格里菲斯周期图像的代数性猜想和与西格尔模簇相关的安德烈-奥尔特猜想，为数论做出了重大贡献。 发布会结束后，他宣布打算将研究重点转向AI安全，并很快加入OpenAI。 消息一出，OpenAI 首席研究官 Mark Chen 和微软 AI 前副总裁、现任 OpenAI 研究员 Sebastien Bubeck 均予以证实并表示欢迎。 陈马克称赞齐默曼拥有顶级的数学天赋，也钦佩他对人工智能安全问题严谨仔细的态度和深刻独特的思考。
